description: This file defines the HistoryRepository class responsible for managing history entries, including listing, adding, and clearing history items, in a Kotlin-based Android frontend project.

classes.name: HistoryRepository
classes.description: Repository class for managing a history list with operations to list, add, and clear history entries.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Returns the current list of history entries sorted by newest first.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new history entry, maintaining the maximum item limit.
